title: Multi-Tenant SaaS Expense Management
description: SaaS platform with isolated company instances achieving 99.9% data segregation. Features RBAC with 3-tier access control, automated approval workflows, and Puppeteer/xlsx-based PDF & Excel reporting.

title: Dev Project Planner
description: Full-stack project management dashboard with projects, features, and task tracking. Includes AI-powered task generation that converts natural language project descriptions into structured task breakdowns. Built with TypeScript and TanStack Query for efficient server-state management, caching, and automatic query invalidation.

title: Blog Platform
description: Full-stack MERN blog platform with JWT authentication, role-based content management, and automated data lifecycle handling. Supports blog publishing workflow with soft deletion, scheduled permanent cleanup via cron jobs, advanced search, sorting, pagination, and author-specific dashboard management. Includes live image preview and structured validation middleware.
highlights: JWT authentication with secure password hashing (bcrypt)
Soft delete with automated 30-day cron cleanup
Live image preview with optional Cloudinary integration
